_description: Symbol definitions for ARR_ATOM_CXPKGS9 MTPL BluePrint generation
_format: Each symbol maps to its possible values and a plain-English description

FREQ_CORNER.description: Frequency corner index used in VMIN search tests (F1 through F4). Each corner targets a different operating frequency for the ATOM domain.

SEARCH_VARIANT.description: The search variant defines the type of array coverage being tested: COMBINED covers all arrays, SSA targets single-sided arrays only, and SSA_L2DATA targets L2 data arrays specifically.
appears_in: Patlist (COMBINED=all_all, SSA=all_all but BypassPort=1, SSA_L2DATA=directdsdb_ssa + l2_data)

CPU_DIE.description: CPU die selector. Many tests are duplicated for a second CPU die (CPU1) with minor parameter differences such as FuseNamespace and GSDS storage keys.
appears_in: Test name suffix (_CPU1 for second die, no suffix for first)

MODULE_INDEX.description: Module index within the L2 cache. Each module (M0-M3) corresponds to a physical cache module being tested in the raster repair pipeline.

SSA_ARRAY_TYPE.description: Array type being tested in the SSA (Single-Sided Array) raster capture/repair/rep2fuse pipeline.

LSA_ARRAY_TYPE.description: Array type for LSA (Large-Scale Array) raster repair. Covers C6, LRU, and STATE sub-arrays.

VOLTAGE_CORNER.description: Voltage corner for raster repair and capture tests. MIN targets minimum voltage operation; MAX targets maximum voltage.

PMUX_INDEX.description: Power-mux frequency callback index. Four callbacks (0-3) calculate the frequency switch for each ATOM compute cluster.

REP_DIRECTION.description: Repair direction for VFDM export, ScreenTC and PatConfig tests. VMIN-side repair vs VMAX-side repair.
appears_in: Test name (VMINREP vs VMAXREP, MIN vs MAX in LSA tests)

L2_ENDCPU_TYPE.description: L2 sub-array for ENDCPU VminTC scoreboard tests.

HRY_PHASE.description: Phase of the HRY (Hierarchy) array test — before or after repair.

LSA_RASTER_MODE.description: LSA raster operational mode: R=repair, NONREP_MP=non-repairable multipass.

RASTERLOOP_TYPE.description: PatConfig raster loop type for XSA tests.

VMIN_MTT_F1_F4.description: VminTC MultiTrialTest for frequency corners F1 through F4, each with 3 search variants

VMIN_MTT_F5.description: VminTC MultiTrialTest for F5 corner with ATOM_TOP trial variable, 3 variants (COMBINED, MEC, SSA_L2DATA)
VMIN_MTT_F5.note: F5 uses ATOM_TOP trial variable, different freq references (Corners.AT_C5, FreqValues.AT_C5)

VMIN_MTT_FMIN.description: VminTC MultiTrialTest for FMIN corner, 5 variants including FF_SEARCH
VMIN_MTT_FMIN.note: FMIN uses different timing, different StartVoltages (forwarded from F1 results)

SB_BEGINCPU.description: VminTC Scoreboard tests at BEGINCPUNOM, F3 frequency

SB_VMAX_F1.description: VminTC Scoreboard VMAX tests at F1

SB_VMAX_F5.description: VminTC Scoreboard/MTT VMAX tests at F5

ENDCPU_L2.description: VminTC Scoreboard ENDCPU tests for L2 TAG and DATA

PMUX_CALLBACKS.description: RunCallback tests for power-mux frequency calculation per ATOM cluster

SSA_RASTER_PIPELINE.description: Capture, Repair, and Rep2Fuse pipeline per module and array type
SSA_RASTER_PIPELINE.instance_count: 2 voltages x 2 arrays x 4 modules x 3 stages x 2 dies = 96

LSA_RASTER_PIPELINE.description: LSA Capture, Repair, and Rep2Fuse pipeline per module and LSA array type
LSA_RASTER_PIPELINE.instance_count: 2 voltages x 3 arrays x 4 modules x 3 stages x 2 dies = 144

XSA_HRY_TESTS.description: PrimeArrayHryTestMethod pre/post repair per voltage corner and CPU die

LSA_HRY_TESTS.description: PrimeLSARasterTestMethod and PrimeArrayHryTestMethod for LSA HRY testing

SCREEN_L2_SETLOCAL.description: ScreenTC set local L2 repair tests
